commands.review_summary:
The PR changes diagnostic response-byte accounting to ignore accumulated `partial` snapshots on streamed chunks, adds regression tests, and updates OTEL/logging docs for the new metric contract.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +104, Docs 0. Total +126 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source reproduction path: current main stringifies each stream chunk, while the stream event contract carries accumulated `partial` snapshots. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
